name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash is located at 5532 Menchaca Rd, Austin, TX 78745 in the South Austin neighborhood. Business status: CLOSED_PERMANENTLY. Google reviewers rate the branch 3.8 stars across 24 reviews. Call +1 512-707-1229.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a short-term lending provider operating physical retail locations across multiple states, including Tennessee. The company has been established as a neighborhood lending option positioning itself with the tagline "Tomorrow can be payday." They emphasize in-store customer service and transparent lending practices.

Speedy Cash offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (up to $425 with repayment due around the next payday), Lines of Credit (up to $4,000 with flexible draw amounts and repayment over time), and Title Loans (up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral). The Memphis location at 5126 Summer Avenue operates Monday-Saturday with extended evening hours (7pm on Monday and Friday). In addition to loan products, they provide ancillary financial services including money orders, wire transfers, check cashing, and Green Dot Visa debit card services.

The company distinguishes itself through in-store application support where customers can review loan terms, ask questions throughout the process, and understand costs before signing. They emphasize transparency by stating borrowers "will know exactly how much it costs to borrow the funds prior to signing your loan agreement." The company also offers online application initiation for eligible products and maintains multilingual customer service (English and Spanish).

As a short-term lender, Speedy Cash targets consumers needing emergency funds quickly. However, potential borrowers should recognize that payday and title loans typically carry high APRs compared to traditional banking products, though specific rates are not disclosed on this webpage. The company operates within regulatory frameworks that vary by state (noting Alabama-specific title pawn requirements). This lender is appropriate for emergency situations but should not be viewed as a long-term financial solution.
pros: Multiple loan options: payday loans, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000
Fast funding available with in-store application process and online application option
Transparent pricing: states borrowers know exact costs before signing loan agreement
Extended operating hours (open until 7pm Monday and Friday) accommodating working schedules
In-person support allowing customers to ask questions and review terms before committing
Additional financial services including check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers
Multilingual customer service in English and Spanish
Multiple Memphis locations (8 stores listed in the area) for accessibility
cons: High-cost short-term lending products with APRs not disclosed on website, typical of payday/title loan industry
Payday loans capped at only $425, limiting usefulness for larger emergency expenses
Title loans require clear title in most states and vehicle appraisal, restricting eligibility
Limited information about debt-to-income requirements or credit checks in application process
Line of Credit application requirements identical to payday loans despite higher limits, suggesting possible approval barriers
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$425 for immediate emergency expenses before payday
Vehicle owners needing $500-$4,000 in collateral-based loans with flexible repayment
Borrowers who prefer in-person application support and real-time loan term clarification
Those with checking accounts and stable income who can meet proof of employment requirements
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for individuals facing genuine emergencies who have stable income and need $100-$4,000 within one to two days. The primary caveat is that payday and title loans carry significantly higher costs than traditional bank products or credit union alternatives, making them suitable only for short-term emergency situations, not recurring financial needs.
services: In-store loan applications with staff assistance
Green Dot Visa debit card services
Vehicle appraisal services for title loans
